id.description: Unique identifier for the external location.

url.description: Path URL of the external location.

credential_name.description: Name of the storage credential used with this location.

owner.description: The owner of the external location.

credential_id.description: Unique ID of the location's storage credential.

created_at.description: Time at which this external location was created, in epoch milliseconds.

updated_at.description: Time at which external location this was last modified, in epoch milliseconds.

updated_by.description: Username of user who last modified the external location.
